title: context.py: MATCH_MAPPING uses O(n) tuple membership check
description:
src/lichen/schc/context.py:48-49 uses 'value in fd.mapping' where fd.mapping is a tuple, giving O(n) lookup.

Same pattern in codec.py:154-157 and codec.py:171. For rules with larger mappings (8+ values), a frozenset would provide O(1) lookup while keeping immutability.
close_reason: Acceptable - mapping tuples are typically small (2-8 port numbers). For N<10, tuple 'in' is faster than frozenset due to lower overhead.
